name: Amotiv Limited
analysis: AOV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 33% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.4300, stop A$5.9598, target A$8.1776 (3.72:1) — then trail it.
